description: Hand-crafted frustrated e-commerce examples for the 5 key scenarios from dissertation §3.2

examples.text: My order still hasn't arrived after 10 days. This is completely unacceptable!!
Where is my package?? It was supposed to be here LAST WEEK
I've been waiting 2 weeks for a delivery that was promised in 3 days!
Still processing after 8 days? Are you serious right now??
I NEED this order and it's been sitting in a warehouse for days. Ridiculous.
I paid for 3 items and only 1 arrived. Where is the rest of my order?!
Half my order is missing and I've been on hold for 40 minutes. This is a JOKE
Two items from my order didn't show up and no one is doing anything about it
I ordered 5 things and only got 2. Where are my other items??
My package shows delivered but nothing arrived. Someone stole it or you lied.
I requested a refund 2 WEEKS ago and nothing has happened. Give me my money back NOW
Why is it taking so long to process my refund? This is theft.
I want my refund immediately. I've been waiting long enough!
Still no refund after 3 weeks?? I'm going to contact my bank about this fraud
Your refund policy is a scam. I've been trying for a month to get my money back.
You sent me the completely WRONG item. Again. This is the second time!
I ordered a blue jacket and you sent me red shoes. How does this even happen??
Third time ordering this and THIRD TIME you got it wrong. I give up.
This is not what I ordered at all. Completely wrong product.
Wrong size, wrong color, wrong item. Did anyone even look at my order?!
I've explained this 4 times now and this useless bot keeps giving me the same answer!
STOP repeating yourself. I want to speak to a REAL PERSON RIGHT NOW
This chatbot is completely useless. Get me a human immediately.
I've been going in circles for 30 minutes. No more bots. Human agent please.
Same answer every time. You're not helping me. Transfer me to someone who can.
I'm very disappointed with this service. The delivery was late.
This isn't great. I expected better customer support.
A bit frustrated honestly. Can someone help me sort this out?
Hi, I'm having some trouble with my order. It hasn't arrived yet.
Could you check on order #12345? It seems delayed.
